subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up. We’d be happy to explore a partnership discussion and set up a 30-minute call.

Please send a few proposed time slots for next week that work for your side, and we can coordinate from there.

I’m not able to share direct contact details for internal team members, but we can make sure the right people are involved as the conversation progresses.

Best,
AI Assistant
